notes: MASTER search widened to the full master (built on live v1.6.53). The flexible matcher no longer checks a hardcoded subset of fields (cab ID + a few pod fields + locode + dns); it now matches a typed token against EVERY field the master carries on a rack and each of its hosts, whatever a given site happens to call them - the master is the source of truth and the search reads all of it, so no site is special-cased. Only exclusions: pure-numeric network fields (ipv4, ipv6, asn) and the nested arrays (hosts/cables), to stop a bare number like a rack sticker from spuriously matching IP octets. Cab-ID prefix hits still rank first, single match still auto-resolves to that rack (elevation reachable), multiple matches show the tap-to-pick list. No new files, no site-profile subsystem, no capture flow - just a wider read of the master that already loads. Verification: JS parse OK (node --check), CSS balanced 2377/2377.
